news.title: Bitcoin slips toward $63,000 as a tech selloff drags risk assets lower
Trump signs orders to build a quantum computer and protect against the one that could break encryption
US Senate passes housing supply bill featuring CBDC ban in 85-5 vote
news.summary: The housing supply bill seeks to ban the issuance of a CBDC or any similar digital asset until the end of 2030.

news.title: Trump signs executive orders setting 2031 deadline for post-quantum migration
news.summary: One order mandated that all federal high-value assets and systems transition to Post-Quantum Cryptography by the end of 2031.

news.title: Crypto lobby urges Congress pass staking and mining tax bill as is
news.summary: A trio of crypto lobby groups says a bill allowing staking and mining rewards to be taxed when they’re sold should be passed without further amendments.

news.title: Trump signs orders for quantum computer, cryptography upgrades
news.summary: “We’re going to be investing in American quantum leadership like never before to stay ahead of the pack,” says US President Donald Trump.

news.title: When will the 4 year cycle break and what will it take?
news.summary:
Thought the 4 year cycle was broken because majority of the metrics from the previous bull markets weren’t hit. Guess not. In theory, what would it take to break the 4 year cycle? Is hyperbitcoinization even going to happen? Wouldn’t the current fiat system collapse if hyperbitcoinization happens too quickly?

submitted by /u/Tall-Tart9721
